description: This file defines a roles repository module for MySQL, providing functions to count, list, insert, check existence, and search role records in a database. It includes internal utility functions for parsing salary ranges and skills containment.

methods.name: countRoles
methods.description: Returns the total number of roles in the database.

methods.name: listRoles
methods.description: Retrieves a list of roles with optional limit, returning parsed coreSkills and seniorityLevels.

methods.name: bulkInsertRoles
methods.description: Inserts multiple role records into the database, generating UUIDs if not provided.

methods.name: _roleExists
methods.description: Checks if a role with a specific ID exists in the database.

methods.name: searchRoles
methods.description: Performs a multi-filter search for roles based on query, industry, skills, and salary range, with fallback to unfiltered query.
